title: Lite Tools (0.333)
description: Shrinks weapons and tools to one-third of their normal size in first-person.
body:
Makes weapons and tools appear at a third of their normal size in first person. This helps improve visibility, reduces visual clutter, and makes it easier to focus on PvP, building, or general gameplay without large items blocking your view. Perfect for players who prefer a simple, lightweight visual tweak that keeps the default style while making first-person combat and feel more open and comfortable.

Try out a slightly smaller version here: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lite-tools-half

**Subscribe to my YouTube:** https://www.youtube.com/@OasisSucksAtMc?sub_confirmation=1
